name: @omerrgocmen/crewctl
description: CrewCtl — Zero-dependency Node.js orchestrator that runs installed CLI coding agents as one operator-led team.

scripts.test: node orchestrator/test/ui-smoke.test.js && node orchestrator/test/cli.test.js && node orchestrator/test/server-flow.test.js && node orchestrator/test/skills.test.js && node orchestrator/test/schedule.test.js && node orchestrator/test/team-flow.test.js && node orchestrator/test/live-diff.test.js && node orchestrator/test/checkpoints.test.js
